creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
As far as I can tell: 

* EOL for stable/10 coincided with EOL for 10.4-RELEASE
  2018-10-31

* EOL for stable/11 coincided with EOL for 11.4-RELEASE
  2021-09-30

– respectively: 

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/diff/en_US.ISO8859-1/htdocs/security/security.xml?id=6f8719ccfeb70956143957c423b5a79413333384>

<https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/diff/website/content/en/security/_index.adoc?id=87fb7969d66582d16f3c251ec20410a7fddb95b9>
